Requirements on Log and Trace  
AUTOSAR  FO Release 1.5.0   
4 of 29 Document ID 350: AUTOSAR_ RS_LogAndTrace  
- AUTOSAR confidential - 
Table of Contents  
1 Scope of Document  :  :  :   5 
2 Conventions to be used  :  :  :   6 
3 Acronyms and abbreviations  :  :  :   7 
4 Functional Overview  :  :  :   9

5.1 Requirements Tracing  :  :  :   10 
5.2 Functional Requirements  :  :  :   11 
5.2.1  Log and trace interfaces  :  :  :   11 
5.2.2  Format of log and trace message  :  :   18

5.2.4  Operational function  :  :  :   26 
5.3 Non functional Requirements  :  :  :  27 
5.3.1  [RS_LT_00041] L T shall be a central software component for the log 
and trace functionality.  :  :  :   27 
5.3.2  [RS_LT_00042] The Log and trace SW component shall be part of the 
system during production phase.  :  :   28 
6 References  :  :  :  :   29
